**Developing Project Governance**

I'm currently focused on establishing a robust constitutional framework for the Go project. The core principle is mandatory Test-Driven Development, ensuring all code is developed with accompanying tests. Furthermore, I'm implementing a strict policy against any form of failing tests within the project, even for pre-existing code.

**Establishing Project Mandates**

My current focus is on solidifying the project's foundational rules. I'm prioritizing the implementation of mandatory Test-Driven Development across all contributions. A key aspect of this is ensuring zero tolerance for any failing tests, irrespective of when the code was introduced.
